title: Verify the status bar icons are displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and observe the status bar | Check if the battery, signal, and time icons are displayed correctly
expected_result: The battery, signal, and time icons are displayed correctly

title: Verify the main image is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and observe the main image | Check if the main image of the waterfall surrounded by lush greenery is displayed correctly
expected_result: The main image is displayed correctly

title: Verify the footer ad is displayed correctly
test_steps: Open the app and observe the footer ad | Check if the advertisement banner with the text 'AFRICA IS NOW CLOSER THAN EVER' and the logo for 'VueTel' is displayed correctly
expected_result: The footer ad is displayed correctly

title: Verify the primary CTA is functional
test_steps: Open the app and locate the primary CTA | Click on the primary CTA | Verify that the expected action is triggered

title: Verify the app handles interruption and resume correctly
test_steps: Open the app, perform an action, and then interrupt the app | Resume the app and verify that the app state is restored correctly
expected_result: The app state is restored correctly

title: Verify data persistence
test_steps: Open the app, perform an action, and then close the app | Reopen the app and verify that the data is persisted correctly
